title: Postoperative Rehabilitation of Total Knee Arthroplasty
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e8308","text":"This protocol was created by the rehabilitation team of the Hospital Universitario Pedro Ernesto  for patients undergoing total knee arthroplasty surgery.
